creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Jan Beich wrote on 01.02.2013 01:10:
> rm@FreeBSD.org writes:
>
>> Synopsis: [patch] www/py-flexget: update to 07-Jan-2013 snapshot
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>> State-Changed-By: rm
>> State-Changed-When: Thu Jan 31 19:31:53 UTC 2013
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> Hello Jan, would you resend your latest patch as attachment?
>
> No, I have a recurring problem with GNATS not being able to understand
> my attachments sent via Gnus.

Ok, so can you please send this to me directly (or upload it somewhere). 
As attachment. Thanks.

>
>> Do you interested in becoming a maintainer of this port?
>
> No, I do not track upstream nor versed in python.
>
> Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org> writes:
>
>> --=-=-=
>> Content-Type: text/x-patch
>> Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=update.diff
                         ^^^^^^^^^^

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
